steps.t: Oter asked you to call him over to you on your way to Cuthbald's Farm. On the road south of Thrymm's Farm is likely a good spot to summon him.
Cuthbald's Farm is south-east of Thrymm's Farm.
Oter's brother must be on or around Cuthbald's Farm somewhere. With Wargs and Warg-riders around he likely didn't make it far.
Oter's brother was trapped under debris, but appears to be all right. He looks eager to leave Cuthbald's Farm quickly, but would like to speak to you …
Since his brother has been saved and has safely returned to Thrymm's Farm, Oter will be eager to speak with you there.
